text.title: Design Tokens Fundamentals Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Design Tokens Fundamentals end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: pick-source-of-truth
step.action: Write ADR naming the source-of-truth; the other becomes generated.

step.name: alias-semantic-tier
step.action: Create semantic tokens aliasing global via reference syntax.

step.name: scope-component-tier
step.action: Add component-level overrides only where semantic insufficient.

step.name: wire-ci-lint
step.action: Add lint step to CI; fail builds on raw semantic values.

step.name: version-and-publish
step.action: Bump version per SemVer rule; ship release notes.
